prompt: Create a polished BL anime-style summer illustration of two handsome young men standing close together outdoors beside a chain-link fence, framed from the waist up in a romantic slice-of-life composition. The taller man on the left has dark navy-black tousled short hair, a slim athletic build, an open deep-blue button-up shirt over a white T-shirt, layered silver necklaces, and holds a clear plastic iced coffee cup with a black straw in one hand. The shorter man on the right has pale silver-lavender soft short hair, a slender build, a loose white T-shirt, black backpack straps over both shoulders, small earrings, and layered silver necklaces. Their shoulders touch intimately and their heads lean toward each other as if sharing a quiet summer moment; keep the mood tender, youthful, and romantic without explicit content. The background shows a bright blue sky with fluffy white clouds, leafy tree branches casting dappled shadows, a sun flare near the upper right, distant city buildings softened by depth of field, and a blue sign attached to the fence reading 夏の日、君と。 with small handwritten English text below, Summer with you. Use luminous high-detail anime rendering, delicate linework, soft skin shading, cool blue and violet color grading, sparkling highlights, cinematic backlighting, shallow depth of field, and a dreamy summer atmosphere. Add rectangular soft mauve privacy blocks covering both characters' faces, as if the faces are intentionally hidden.
